message:
test(fcp-core): add checkpoint integrity and migration state machine tests

Expand checkpoint and connector_state test coverage with negative-path
tests for payload integrity validation and lease lifecycle edge cases:

checkpoint.rs:
- Test inline transfer encoding detects payload integrity mismatch
  when canonical bytes are corrupted
- Test chunked payload reconstruction rejects length mismatch
  (expected vs actual total bytes)
- Test chunked payload reconstruction rejects integrity mismatch
  (wrong payload_object_id)

connector_state.rs:
- Test resume from Suspended rejects expired lease
- Test resume from Transferring rejects superseded target lease
  (stale fencing token)
- Apply rustfmt formatting to test assertions (begin_transfer,
  resume unwrap chains, assert_ne spacing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
